assertions.title: One item failure does not block other items

steps.action: Open the seeded creator session and confirm the two assigned items remain selected on candidate review.
steps.expected: Only the selected failing and passing items are prepared when preparation starts.
steps.observed: The candidate review showed exactly the two assigned selected items before clicking Prepare Selected (2).

steps.action: Click Prepare Selected and wait for preparation statuses to settle.
steps.expected: One item becomes ready while the other fails with a visible reason.
steps.observed: 今日穿搭分享 💃 became Ready with Open Studio available, while 如何制作完美的咖啡拉花 ☕ showed Failed with reason "Failed to download video: Video is private or unavailable".

steps.action: Inspect the persisted session payload for the two items.
steps.expected: API payload reflects mixed ready/failed outcomes together.
steps.observed: GET /api/sessions/session_cd321aa5b006c05083606910 returned item_0677a6d94064f9ed7b67f66a with prepStatus ready and artifacts, and item_b6e45d09d14d12c7aae47fa4 with prepStatus failed and prepFailureReason.

evidence.consoleErrors: none beyond a favicon 404 unrelated to the flow
evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_cd321aa5b006c05083606910 -> 200 with mixed outcomes: item_0677a6d94064f9ed7b67f66a prepStatus=ready, item_b6e45d09d14d12c7aae47fa4 prepStatus=failed

assertions.title: Failed items expose retry with item-scoped recovery

steps.action: Observe the failed item row after preparation completes.
steps.expected: The failed item shows a retry control.
steps.observed: The failing row displayed a visible Retry button while the ready row kept its Open Studio affordance.

steps.action: Click Retry on the failed item only.
steps.expected: Only the failed item is retried and other items keep their current state.
steps.observed: POST /api/sessions/session_cd321aa5b006c05083606910/prepare/item_b6e45d09d14d12c7aae47fa4/retry was issued for the failing item only; the ready item remained ready with Open Studio still visible.

steps.action: Recheck the preparation page after retry.
steps.expected: Retry remains item-scoped even if the failed item does not recover.
steps.observed: The retry left 今日穿搭分享 💃 in ready state and the failed item remained failed, confirming no cross-item regression.

evidence.consoleErrors: none beyond a favicon 404 unrelated to the flow
evidence.network: POST /api/sessions/session_cd321aa5b006c05083606910/prepare/item_b6e45d09d14d12c7aae47fa4/retry -> request observed; ready sibling item remained unchanged in subsequent GET /api/sessions/session_cd321aa5b006c05083606910 responses

assertions.title: Failed state remains failed until retry succeeds

steps.action: Capture the failed state before refresh.
steps.expected: The failed item shows failed status and reason before page reload.
steps.observed: The failing item showed Failed with reason "Failed to download video: Video is private or unavailable" before refresh.

steps.expected: The failed state and reason persist after refresh.
steps.observed: After reload, the failing item still showed Failed with the same reason and still exposed Retry; it did not appear ready.

steps.action: Retry the item once and check the page again.
steps.expected: The item remains failed until a retry actually succeeds.
steps.observed: After retry, the item still showed Failed with the same reason, so the UI did not falsely transition it to ready.

evidence.consoleErrors: none beyond a favicon 404 unrelated to the flow
evidence.network: GET /api/sessions/session_cd321aa5b006c05083606910 before and after refresh -> 200 with item_b6e45d09d14d12c7aae47fa4 prepStatus=failed and prepFailureReason unchanged; retry POST did not change status to ready

frictions.description: The first attempted /sessions/{sessionId}/candidates path returned a 404; the active candidate review surface for this app is /sessions/{sessionId}.
frictions.resolution: Continued the assigned flow at /sessions/session_cd321aa5b006c05083606910 where the seeded candidate review loaded correctly.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Mixed outcomes worked as expected: one item stayed failed while the other remained ready, retry was item-scoped, and failed state persisted across refresh and unsuccessful retry.
